findings.message: User-supplied input written to database without normalization. The create_item() function docstring explicitly requires use of create_item_normalized() for user-supplied input, but post_item() calls the bare create_item() instead, storing data with uncontrolled casing and whitespace. This violates the stated data consistency strategy.
findings.suggestion: Replace create_item(session, payload.name) with create_item_normalized(session, payload.name) and update the docstring to reflect that normalization is now applied.
